title: Dev Tools Unlocker
description: Unlocks hidden developer tools in Minecraft's code
body:
A Fabric mod that enables or implements developer tools embedded in the base game. You can play around with these tools for fun or utilize them when developing your own mod.

Enables the following commands:
```
/debugpath
/debugmobspawning
/spawn_armor_trims
/serverpack
/warden_spawn_tracker
/raid
/test
/debugconfig (on servers)
```

Enables the following F3 hotkeys:
```
F3-E
F3-L
F3-U
F3-V
F3-W
```

Reimplements debug renderers which can be enabled individually via a custom F3 hotkey: F3-F6
